title: Foundation Models in Bioinformatics: A New Era of AI-Driven Biological Discovery
description: A comprehensive review of foundation models (FMs) in bioinformatics, detailing their application across genomics, proteomics, drug discovery, and single-cell analysis. The article explores core architectures, methodological applications, persistent challenges in data and interpretability, and the importance of rigorous benchmarking.
audience: Researchers, scientists, and drug development professionals
